breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Iran attack sparks two fires in Kuwait, firefighters injured
breaking.summary: The United States and Iran exchanged strikes aimed at infrastructure and military targets on Saturday, July 18, as their battle over the Strait of Hormuz intensified

breaking.title: Venezuela earthquake death toll exceeds 5,000 as IMF releases funds
breaking.summary: The disasters killed 5,069 people, National Assembly chief Jorge Rodriguez posted on Telegram, with most casualties occurring in the coastal region.

breaking.title: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
breaking.summary: Drones targeted Wildberries facilities near Moscow and in Tambov. Ukraine's leader called them "major logistics facilities" supplying "sanctioned components".

breaking.title: Flash flood kills 4, leaves 4 others missing in Vietnam
breaking.summary: The flood in Muong Than ‌village early on Friday (July 17) after days of heavy rains ‌in several parts of northern ‌Vietnam ⁠also injured seven people

breaking.title: Ahead of FIFA World Cup final, Kozhikode police announce public safety measures
breaking.summary: Kozhikode City police said dangerous bike racing, stunt riding, drunk driving, speeding, traffic violations, bursting of firecrackers in a manner that causes public nuisance, raising provocative or hate-filled slogans, and any other activities that disturb public peace have been prohibited

breaking.title: What makes Skyroot’s Vikram-1 launch unique? | Explained
breaking.summary: Skyroot’s Vikram-1 has made India only the third country where a private company has independently placed payloads in orbit. Here’s what makes the mission significant

breaking.title: Sonam Wangchuk hunger strike LIVE: Wangchuk refuses medical intervention at hospital; Dipke holds indefinite hunger strike at Jantar Mantar
breaking.summary: Even if Sonam can't join the July 20 march to Parliament, I will represent him and lead that march, says wife Gitanjali Angmo, also asking for the activist to be shifted from the Safdarjung Hospital

breaking.title: Trump threatens to increase Canada tariffs over wildfire smoke pollution
breaking.summary: President Donald Trump accused Canada of ‘not properly maintaining’ their forests, failing to carry out ‘basic Forest Management and Debris Removal’
